TABLE I FROM IOT TO THE INTERNET OF PHYSICAL AI AGENTS: ARCHITECTURAL LESSONS

Fig. 4. Distributed wildfire response system based on Physical AI Agents. Autonomous drones detect and classify fire events, coordinate through an edge mission orchestrator, and trigger suppression actions over a deterministic communication fabric with identity, policy, and audit controls.

Fig. 5. Closed-loop insulin delivery system implemented as a Physical AI Agent, integrating continuous sensing, on-device prediction and control, safety policy enforcement, secure lifecycle management, and auditability.
